calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2006 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2006 Off Calendar - Award Of Arbitrator

Mtn Re Failure To Respond To Disco & Req For Sanctions Of $900
Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and to deem certain matters admitted is denied as answers have been served. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of the responses. Failure to respond in a timely fashion was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $336.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
